TestCase z8Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_k = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_k, t1.k, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.k = follow_case_k;
    // ------------------------------------
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    // swap two random elements
    int idx1 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    while (idx2 == idx1) {
        idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    }
    double temp = follow_case.k[idx1];
    follow_case.k[idx1] = follow_case.k[idx2];
    follow_case.k[idx2] = temp;
    return follow_case;
}
